name: All About Golf
about: All About Golf is a complete year-round practice facility in Butler, PA, featuring a driving range with Toptracer technology, a 9-hole executive course, and a full-service pro shop. The facility is equipped with Toptracer systems that offer practice modes, virtual golf courses, and skills challenges, allowing golfers to improve their game in any weather. Lessons are available with PGA Professional Tim Nypaver, who offers individual and package options with video analysis to enhance the learning process.
why_golfers_like_it: All-weather hitting bays with Toptracer technology for year-round practice
9-hole executive course with quick rounds available for all skill levels
PGA professional instruction with video analysis for accelerated learning
Full-service pro shop with club fitting and repair services
Virtual golf mode allows playing famous courses in any weather

simulator_hardware.notes: Provides practice modes, virtual golf, and skills challenges

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your own clubs, but the pro shop offers club rentals and fittings.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drink policies are not specified, so it's best to check with the venue directly.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The facility offers a 9-hole executive course (Par 33) with quick 4-hole rounds available, so 18 holes would typically take 1-2 hours depending on pace.

faq.question: Is this place kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the facility offers junior lessons at 20% off for packages 4 hours or longer, and the 9-hole course is suitable for beginners including kids.
